# #37 Use Docca jam module [Closed]

> Username: grisumbras  
> Created at: 2021-04-16 19:25:14 UTC  
> Updated at: 2021-09-08 20:12:26 UTC  
> Closed at: 2021-09-08 20:10:41 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/url/pull/37  

This takes advantage of the Jam module that was added to Docca's develop branch.  
  
* Everything that is already done by the Docca's Jam module was removed from `doc/Jamfile`.  
* There's no need now to copy `reference.qbk` into source directory, so the corresponding gitignore line was removed.  
* Doxygen configuration file is also generated by the Docca's Jam module. Relevant Doxygen parameters are set up via `<doxygen:param>` properties. As a result, `doc/source.dox` was removed, the parameters that differ from Doxygen defaults were put in `doc/Jamfile`.

---
